results.rendered_html:
avyalīka a.
1 Not false, true.
2 Agreeable, having no disagreeable feelings (priya); itthaṃ giraḥ priyatatamā iva so'vyalīkāḥ śuśrāva sūtataṃnayaśca tadā vyalīkāḥ  Śi. 5. 1.
